title: hero sword
description:
Hero Sword Mod

The Hero Sword is a powerful weapon added to Minecraft through a mod. It is a special sword designed to be stronger and faster than normal swords in the game.
body:
The Hero Sword is a powerful custom weapon added by a mod in Minecraft. It is much stronger than normal swords and is designed for advanced survival or PvP gameplay.

⚔️ Hero Sword Stats:

Attack Damage: 16 damage (8 hearts)

Attack Speed: 2.0 (very fast hits)

High durability

Can defeat most mobs in just a few hits

Because of its high damage and fast attack speed, the Hero Sword is stronger than a Netherite Sword and is perfect for boss fights, raids, and tough enemies. It makes combat faster and more powerful compared to vanilla weapons.
